name: pmetra
description: AI-driven parametric CAD — control 3D geometry via MCP tools. Send commands to POST /call, observe results via screenshot.

models.name: TowerExtension
models.description: Rectangular lattice tower — 4 L-section corner beams with diagonal cross-bracing

models.name: ExpNurbsSolid
models.description: Freeform NURBS surface with 8 draggable control points, extruded to a solid

parameters.name: control_points
parameters.description: 8 XYZ control points — points 0-3 front (z=0), 4-7 back (z=surface_length)

models.name: RoundCabinSegment
models.description: Space station cabin — rounded rectangular tube with wall thickness and a movable window cutout

models.name: SimplCubeAtCylinder
models.description: Central cylinder with cubes attached around its circumference — cube count scales with radius

parameters.name: cube_attach_angle
parameters.description: Angle (radians) where cubes attach around cylinder

parameters.name: cube_side_length
parameters.description: Side length of each attached cube

models.name: MultiModelsSimplCubeAtCylinderAndTowerExtension
models.description: Two models in one scene — SimplCubeAtCylinder + TowerExtension, each independently controllable

models.name: MultiModels2TowerExtensions
models.description: Two TowerExtension instances in one scene — demonstrates multi-entity control

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List all exposed resources, components, and materials. Call this first to discover what you can control.

tools.name: get_resource
tools.description: Get current JSON value of a resource or component. Use the short name from list_resources.

tools.name: set_resource
tools.description: Patch a resource or component — only provided fields change, others keep current values. Triggers geometry rebuild for CAD params.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture PNG screenshot of the 3D viewport. Returns base64 data URL. Use after set_resource to verify changes.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Get field names, types, and defaults for a registered type. Call before set_resource to discover valid fields. Use '*' for all types.

name.description: Type name, e.g. 'TowerExtension', or '*' for all

tools.name: load_shape
tools.description: Load Truck JSON geometry (CompressedShell or CompressedSolid) into the scene as a rendered mesh

tools.name: save_shape
tools.description: Serialize a loaded TruckModel back to Truck JSON

tools.name: list_shapes
tools.description: List all loaded Truck shapes (both JSON and STEP imports)

tools.name: load_step
tools.description: Load a STEP file (ISO-10303-21) into the scene. View-only — raw STEP data stored for re-export.

tools.name: save_step
tools.description: Export a loaded StepModel's raw STEP data

tools.name: delete_shape
tools.description: Remove a shape from the scene — despawns entity and removes from localStorage

tools.name: simulate_touch
tools.description: Dispatch synthetic touch/drag on the 3D canvas. Omit end_x/end_y for a tap; provide them for a drag.

skills.name: Parametric CAD Control
skills.description: Control parametric 3D CAD geometry — set parameters, load shapes, take screenshots
